name: messaging
description: Messaging related spans represent operations on topics in streaming data systems and queues, such as producing and consuming messages in Kafka, RabbitMQ.

fields.name: queue.publish
fields.description: Publishing a message to a queue.

fields.name: queue.create
fields.description: Creating a queue or a message for later publishing.

fields.name: queue.receive
fields.description: Receiving a message from a queue.

fields.name: queue.process
fields.description: Processing a message from a queue.

fields.name: queue.settle
fields.description: Settling a message, e.g. acknowledging or rejecting it.

fields.name: queue.submit.arq
fields.description: Publishing a message to an arq queue.

fields.name: queue.task.arq
fields.description: Processing a message from an arq queue.

fields.name: queue.submit.celery
fields.description: Publishing a message to a Celery broker.

fields.name: queue.task.celery
fields.description: Processing a message from a Celery queue.

fields.name: queue.task.dramatiq
fields.description: Publishing a message from a Dramatiq queue.

fields.name: queue.submit.huey
fields.description: Publishing a message to a Huey instance.

fields.name: queue.task.huey
fields.description: Processing a message from a Huey instance.

fields.name: queue.task.rq
fields.description: Processing a message from an RQ queue.
